identity.title: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension First Real Loop ✨
identity.thesis: A system that does not merely act. It learns what deserves to act again.
identity.doctrine: Seed → judgment → sovereign work → proof → reusable capability → vNext.
identity.claimBoundary: This is a replayable, deterministic first-loop demonstration. It is not a claim of achieved AGI or ASI, empirical SOTA, production authority, guaranteed savings, facility-specific engineering advice, external audit, certification, or user-fund authorization.

lineage.translation: Nova-Seed → MARK → Mini Sovereign → five AGI Jobs → Evidence Docket → Capability Compiler → vNext treatment/control → human promotion gate

foresight_genome: Cold-chain energy efficiency is a high-leverage opportunity because facilities have repeated refrigeration energy sinks.
Many interventions are low-capex or operational-review interventions.
Public evidence exists from government, utility, institutional, engineering, manufacturer, and standards sources.
Recommendations can be reviewed through evidence traces and safety gates.
Workflows should transfer to adjacent cold-chain facilities.
risk_envelope: advisory only; facility professionals must review before implementation
promotion_criteria: at least 5 useful interventions are produced
each accepted intervention has at least 3 credible evidence traces
one reusable workflow or rubric is extracted

notes: Opportunity is understandable and low-risk if kept advisory.
There are credible public sources for refrigeration efficiency measures.
Safety boundary must block food-safety-critical control changes and refrigerant handling.

sovereign.mission: Produce a validated cold-chain energy efficiency recommendation package.

jobs.name: Source Discovery
jobs.proof: Source identities and credibility classes preserved; archival verification remains external.

jobs.name: Facility Model Extraction
jobs.proof: No unsupported facility detail was invented.

jobs.name: Intervention Generation
jobs.proof: Every candidate references known source identifiers.

jobs.name: Ranking + Evidence Docket
jobs.proof: Acceptance is evidence packaging, not deployment authority.

sources.title: Industrial Refrigeration — Better Buildings / Better Plants
Energy Efficiency Opportunities in Industrial Refrigeration — US EPA
Purchasing Energy-Efficient Commercial Refrigerators and Freezers — US DOE FEMP
Self-contained commercial fridges and freezers — Natural Resources Canada
Refrigeration System Controls — Energy Technology List
Improving the Energy Efficiency of Industrial Refrigeration Systems by Means of Data-Driven Load Management
Cold Storage Facility Design — Engineering Guide for Refrigeration & Insulation
Maximise Efficiency in Refrigerated Storage Units — Dephna
Warehouse Refrigeration and Cold Storage Energy Savings
Cold Storage Energy Management — Inertia Resources

acceptedInterventions.title: Audit door seals, strip curtains, airlocks, and door discipline
acceptedInterventions.mechanism: Reduce warm moist air infiltration so refrigeration load and frost formation decline.
causal_chain: less compressor runtime and frost burden
risk_notes: must not compromise emergency egress or food handling workflow

acceptedInterventions.title: Switch off or schedule lighting and anti-condensation heaters where safe
acceptedInterventions.mechanism: Lights and heaters add direct electricity load and heat that refrigeration must remove.
preconditions: confirm safety, visibility, and condensation requirements
risk_notes: must preserve safety and product integrity

acceptedInterventions.title: Reduce overstocking and blocked air-grille conditions
acceptedInterventions.mechanism: Blocked grilles and overstocking impair airflow, increasing cooling time and temperature variability.

acceptedInterventions.title: Clean condenser and evaporator coils and verify airflow paths
acceptedInterventions.mechanism: Dirty coils and blocked airflow reduce heat-transfer efficiency and increase compressor/fan runtime.
risk_notes: maintenance should follow manufacturer and facility procedures

compiler.purpose: Reusable cold-chain energy evidence workflow extracted from Seed-001.
source_discovery_rules: prefer government, utility, institutional, engineering, manufacturer, and standards sources
require at least three evidence traces per accepted intervention
separate evidence for mechanism, implementation precondition, and risk boundary
causalization_rubric: show how the intervention reduces load, runtime, lift, heat gain, or control waste
separate advisory recommendations from operational changes
red_team_rules: block food-safety-critical setpoint changes without expert review
block electrical work recommendations without licensed review
label controls/defrost/head-pressure work as CAUTION unless framed as audit/review

vNext.mutation: target facility changes from refrigerated warehouse to food-processing cold-chain facility
added_constraints: stronger restriction on setpoint and defrost recommendations
recommend measurement and review before operational control changes
foresight_genome: Cold-chain energy efficiency is a high-leverage opportunity because facilities have repeated refrigeration energy sinks.
Many interventions are low-capex or operational-review interventions.
Public evidence exists from government, utility, institutional, engineering, manufacturer, and standards sources.
Recommendations can be reviewed through evidence traces and safety gates.
Workflows should transfer to adjacent cold-chain facilities.
Food-processing cold-chain facilities combine refrigeration loads with process, hygiene, scheduling, and product-safety constraints.
risk_envelope: advisory only; facility professionals must review before implementation
no food-safety-critical process recommendation without expert review
promotion_criteria: at least 5 useful interventions are produced
each accepted intervention has at least 3 credible evidence traces
one reusable workflow or rubric is extracted

comparison.claim_boundary: This treatment/control result is deterministic first-loop evidence. External proof requires independent reviewer replication and archived source verification.

invariants.title: No evidence, no promotion
invariants.detail: A completed task does not become reusable capability without a sealed Evidence Docket.

invariants.title: No authority by self-assertion
invariants.detail: The loop may recommend; it cannot grant itself production, financial, operational, or legal authority.

invariants.title: No hidden mutation
invariants.detail: vNext must identify its parent, reused construct, new constraints, and changed assumptions.

invariants.title: No learning without control
invariants.detail: Reuse claims require a declared baseline, treatment, metric, safety delta, and falsification rule.

invariants.title: No claim without provenance
invariants.detail: Every accepted intervention retains source identifiers, causal logic, preconditions, failure modes, and review status.

invariants.title: No settlement before review
invariants.detail: Utility settlement remains a record of bounded work; user funds and external execution remain unauthorized.

invariants.title: No erasure of dissent
invariants.detail: Needs-review and prohibited outcomes remain visible rather than being optimized out of the record.

invariants.title: No recursion without rollback
invariants.detail: Every promoted construct remains versioned, challengeable, reversible, and subordinate to human renewal.

threats.title: Citation hallucination
threats.control: Known source IDs, archived references, and independent replay before external proof.

threats.title: Metric gaming
threats.control: Treatment/control comparison plus safety and hallucination deltas.

threats.title: Capability laundering
threats.control: Lineage, artifact hashes, parent seed, and extracted-rule registry.

threats.title: Silent scope expansion
threats.control: Mission contract, risk envelope, explicit added constraints, and state transition guards.

threats.title: Premature promotion
threats.control: Evidence-ready is not authority-ready; final state remains HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED.

artifactLedger.name: Run Manifest
artifactLedger.purpose: Canonical state, boundaries, metrics, and terminal disposition.

artifactLedger.name: Nova-Seed 001
artifactLedger.purpose: Foresight genome, work graph, risk envelope, and promotion criteria.

artifactLedger.name: Mini Sovereign Charter
artifactLedger.purpose: Bounded mission, budget proxy, and forbidden actions.

artifactLedger.name: Job Graph
artifactLedger.purpose: Five success-gated work stages with explicit outputs.

artifactLedger.name: Source Ledger
artifactLedger.purpose: Twelve curated references with source classes and support scope.

artifactLedger.name: Intervention Register
artifactLedger.purpose: Accepted recommendations with causal chains and risk labels.

artifactLedger.name: Capability Compiler v0
artifactLedger.purpose: Reusable schemas, source rules, rubrics, and red-team constraints.

artifactLedger.name: vNext Seed 002
artifactLedger.purpose: Parent-linked adjacent task with stronger constraints.

phases.label: Commit
phases.title: Mission contract sealed
phases.detail: Intent, risk envelope, success conditions, and authority boundary become immutable run inputs.

phases.label: Seed
phases.title: Nova-Seed ignited
phases.detail: The foresight genome and five-job graph define what may be attempted.

phases.label: MARK
phases.title: Admissibility adjudicated
phases.detail: Coherence, evidence, usefulness, safety, reuse, and executability are scored.

phases.label: Sovereign
phases.title: Bounded institution formed
phases.detail: A mini Sovereign receives advisory authority only and may not operate equipment.

phases.label: Work
phases.title: Five AGI Jobs executed
phases.detail: Discovery, facility modeling, generation, causal red-team, and ranking run in sequence.

phases.label: Proof
phases.title: Evidence Docket sealed
phases.detail: Provenance, decisions, failures, risks, and accepted artifacts are bound into one inspectable package.

phases.label: Learn
phases.title: Capability Compiler extracted
phases.detail: Only reusable rules and schemas that survived the loop enter institutional memory.

phases.label: vNext
phases.title: Treatment challenged
phases.detail: Seed 002 reuses the compiler against a control and reaches the human promotion boundary.
